chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3672 - وَ رَوَى أَبُو اَلْبَخْتَرِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "لَإِسْمَاعُ اَلْأَصَمِّ مِنْ غَيْرِ ضَجَرٍ صَدَقَةٌ هَنِيئَةٌ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3672 - Abu Al-Bakhtari narrated from Abu Abdillah (as) who said:
"Helping a deaf person to hear without annoyance is a pleasant charity."
